properties.displayName: System Information Discovery via whoami and hostname
properties.description: Detects system information discovery attempts using whoami, hostname, and similar commands
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\whoami.exe" or Image|endswith has "\hostname.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "whoami" or CommandLine|contains has "hostname" or CommandLine|contains has "/all" or CommandLine|contains has "/groups" or CommandLine|contains has "/priv") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "$env:username" or CommandLine|contains has "$env:computername" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_ComputerSystem" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::UserName" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::MachineName")
